mainEntity.name: Can I still file a claim if the falling object hit my already-bad back?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if the accident aggravated or accelerated a pre-existing condition, you are entitled to benefits. You will need clear medical evidence showing how the falling object specifically worsened your previous condition.
